description.value:
Frequency once per hour

Like the star or supernova you wish to emulate, you've learned to focus and release bursts of radiation. All non-novian creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} for 2 rounds.

Critical Failure The creature is sickened 2 for 1 minute.
